mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant ( tenant_code, tenant_name, contact_person, contact_phone, contact_email, description, status, data_isolation, compute_isolation, resource_count, is_del ) VALUES ( #{tenantCode}, #{tenantName}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{description}, #{status}, #{dataIsolation}, #{computeIsolation}, 0, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tenant
tenant_name = #{tenantName}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, data_isolation = #{dataIsolation}, compute_isolation = #{computeIsolation}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE tenant SET is_del = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tenant SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE tenant SET resource_count = resource_count + #{increment}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{tenantId} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_code as tenantCode, tenant_name as tenantName, contact_person as contactPerson, contact_phone as contactPhone, contact_email as contactEmail, description, status, data_isolation as dataIsolation, compute_isolation as computeIsolation, resource_count as resourceCount, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_del as isDel FROM tenant WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0

SELECT id, tenant_code as tenantCode, tenant_name as tenantName, contact_person as contactPerson, contact_phone as contactPhone, contact_email as contactEmail, description, status, data_isolation as dataIsolation, compute_isolation as computeIsolation, resource_count as resourceCount, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_del as isDel FROM tenant WHERE tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND is_del = 0

SELECT id, tenant_id as tenantId, resource_id as resourceId, resource_name as resourceName, resource_type as resourceType, permission_level as permissionLevel, quota_amount as quotaAmount, quota_unit as quotaUnit, used_amount as usedAmount, status, effective_time as effectiveTime, expiry_time as expiryTime, remark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM tenant_resource_allocation WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, tenant_id as tenantId, cpu_quota as cpuQuota, memory_quota as memoryQuota, storage_quota as storageQuota, dataset_limit as datasetLimit, model_limit as modelLimit, concurrent_tasks as concurrentTasks, network_isolation as networkIsolation, namespace, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM tenant_isolation_config WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as normalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as frozenCount, SUM(resource_count) as totalResourceCount FROM tenant WHERE is_del = 0
SELECT resource_id AS id, resource_name AS name, '数据集' AS type FROM data_resource WHERE is_del = 0 ORDER BY resource_id DESC LIMIT 200
